heroes.shortBioEn: First Indian queen to fight British rule
heroes.shortBioKn: ಬ್ರಿಟಿಷ್ ವಿರುದ್ಧ ಹೋರಾಡಿದ ಭಾರತದ ಮೊದಲ ರಾಣಿ
heroes.statueDescEn: Kittur Rani Chennamma Memorial, Kittur Fort
heroes.statueDescKn: ಕಿತ್ತೂರು ರಾಣಿ ಚೆನ್ನಮ್ಮ ಸ್ಮಾರಕ, ಕಿತ್ತೂರು ಕೋಟೆ

storyPages.contentEn: Rani Chennamma was born in 1778. From childhood, she could ride horses and wield swords like warriors. Everyone said she had the courage of a thousand soldiers! When she became Queen, she promised her people she would never surrender to injustice.
storyPages.contentKn: ರಾಣಿ ಚೆನ್ನಮ್ಮ 1778 ರಲ್ಲಿ ಕಾಕತಿ ಗ್ರಾಮದಲ್ಲಿ ಜನಿಸಿದರು. ಬಾಲ್ಯದಿಂದಲೇ ಅಶ್ವಾರೋಹಣ ಮತ್ತು ಖಡ್ಗ ಬಳಕೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪಟುಳಿ. ರಾಣಿಯಾಗಿ ಬಂದಾಗ ಎಲ್ಲರ ಹೃದಯ ಜಯಿಸಿದರು.

storyPages.contentEn: When British soldiers came to capture Kittur, Rani Chennamma said NO! She rode her horse into battle, sword in hand. Her soldiers fought with amazing courage! In the first battle, they defeated the British! The people cheered. She even captured two British officers!
storyPages.contentKn: ಬ್ರಿಟಿಷರು ಕಿತ್ತೂರನ್ನು ವಶಪಡಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳಲು ಬಂದಾಗ, ರಾಣಿ ಕುದುರೆಯ ಮೇಲೆ ಹತ್ತಿ ಖಡ್ಗ ಬಟ್ಟೆ ಹೊಳೆಯುತ್ತಿತ್ತು! ಮೊದಲ ಯುದ್ಧದಲ್ಲಿ ಅವರನ್ನು ಸೋಲಿಸಲಾಯಿತು! ಎರಡು ಅಧಿಕಾರಿಗಳನ್ನು ಸೆರೆಹಿಡಿದಳು!

storyPages.contentEn: Though she was eventually captured, Rani Chennamma never lost her spirit. Every year on October 22, Karnataka celebrates Kittur Utsav in her honor. She is remembered as 'Veeranari' — the Brave Woman. Her name inspires freedom fighters even today!
storyPages.contentKn: ಸೆರೆ ಹಿಡಿಯಲ್ಪಟ್ಟೂ ಅವಳ ಮನೋಬಲ ಅವಚೆತೆ. ಇಂದೂ ಅಕ್ಟೋಬರ್ 22 ರಾಂದೆ ಕಿತ್ತೂರು ಉತ್ಸವ ಆಚರಣೆಯಾಗುತ್ತದೆ! 'ವೀರನಾರಿ' ಎನುವ ಹೆಸರಿನಿಂದ ಖ್ಯಾತಳೆ!

quizQuestions.questionEn: In which year was Rani Chennamma born?
quizQuestions.explanationEn: Rani Chennamma was born in 1778 in Kakati village
She is called Veeranari meaning 'The Brave Woman'
October 22 is celebrated as Kittur Utsav across Karnataka

heroes.shortBioEn: Greatest warrior who fought alongside Rani Chennamma

storyPages.contentEn: Sangolli Rayanna was born in 1798 in a small village called Sangolli. As a boy, he loved horses and adventure. He trained hard to become a warrior. By adulthood, he was the strongest and bravest fighter anyone had ever seen!
storyPages.contentKn: ರಾಯಣ್ಣ 1798 ರಲ್ಲಿ ಸಂಗೊಳ್ಳಿ ಗ್ರಾಮದಲ್ಲಿ ಜನಿಸಿದ. ಹುಡುಗನೆಯಲ್ಲೇ ಕುದುರೆ ಸವಾರಿ ಪ್ರಿಯ. ಯುವಕನಾಗುತ್ತಾ ಭೀಷಣ ಯೋಧನಾದ.

storyPages.contentEn: When Rani Chennamma fought the British, Rayanna became her greatest soldier! His sword skills were unmatched. In every battle, he fought with such courage that enemies trembled! His loyal heart and strong arm made him the people's favorite hero.
storyPages.contentKn: ರಾಣಿ ಅವರ ಮಹಾನ್ ಸೈನಿಕನಾದ ರಾಯಣ್ಣ! ಖಡ್ಗ ಬಳಕೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಅತುಲನೀಯ. ಪ್ರತಿ ಯುದ್ಧದಲ್ಲಿ ಧೈರ್ಯದಿಂದ ಜನಾನ ನೇಮಕ. ಮುಖ್ಯಾಪತಿಯಾದ ರಾಯಣ್ಣ!

storyPages.contentEn: Though Rayanna was eventually captured, his brave spirit never died. His story inspires millions! People sing about his courage. He showed that one brave heart can inspire a whole nation! He is Karnataka's eternal hero!
storyPages.contentKn: ರಾಯಣ್ಣನ ಧೈರ್ಯ ಎಂದೆಂದಿಗೂ ಸ್ಮರಣೀಯ. ಜನ ಮಿನುಗರೂ ಹಾಡುತ್ತಾರೆ. ಒಂದು ಧೀರ ಹೃದಯ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ರಾಷ್ಟ್ರನ್ನ ಪ್ರೇರೆಪಿಸಬಹುದೆಂದು ತೋರಿ. ಚಿರ ನಾಯಕ!

quizQuestions.explanationEn: Born in Sangolli village near Belagavi
Served Rani Chennamma as her greatest soldier
Famous for exceptional sword fighting skills

districts.descriptionEn: City of palaces and great rulers

storyPages.contentEn: Tipu Sultan was born in 1750. His father Hyder Ali was a great warrior who ruled Mysore. People called young Tipu after a beloved saint. From childhood, Tipu learned war strategy, languages, and science. He dreamed of a free, strong Mysore!
storyPages.contentKn: ಟಿಪ್ಪು 1750 ರಲ್ಲಿ ಜನ್ಮೆ. ತಂದೆ ಹೈದರ್ ಅಲಿ ಮಹಾನ್ ಯೋಧ. ಸ್ವತಂತ್ರ ಮೈಸೂರಿನ ಸ್ವಪ್ನೆ ಕಂಡ.

storyPages.contentEn: Tipu Sultan did something amazing — he invented war rockets! These were among the world's first military rockets! He also built better roads, started industries, and promoted agriculture. He believed progress comes from knowledge and innovation. He was far ahead of his time!
storyPages.contentKn: ಟಿಪ್ಪು ಶಾರದ ರಾಕೆಟ್ ಆವಿಷ್ಕರಿಸಿದ! ಮೈಸೂರು ರಾಕೆಟ್ ವಿಶ್ವ ಇತಿಹಾಸದಲ್ಲಿ ಖ್ಯಾತ! ರಸ್ತೆ, ಕೃಷಿ, ಕಾರ್ಖಾನೆ ಪ್ರೋತ್ಸಾಹ!

storyPages.contentEn: Tipu had a famous saying: 'Better to live one day as a tiger than a hundred years as a sheep!' He fought four wars against the British, never backing down. In 1799, he died bravely defending Srirangapatna Fort. His courage still inspires millions!
storyPages.contentKn: 'ನೂರು ವರ್ಷ ಕುರಿಯೇ ಬೆಳೆಸುವುದಕ್ಕಿಂತ ಒಂದು ದಿನ ಹುಲಿಯಾಗಿ ಬಿಕುಕಿರುವುದೆ ಶ್ರೇಷ್ಠ!' 1799 ರಲ್ಲಿ ಕೋಟೆ ರಕ್ಷಣೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಣ ತ್ಯಜಿಸಿ!

quizQuestions.questionEn: In which year did Tipu Sultan die?

heroes.shortBioEn: Developed Mysore into a modern and prosperous state

storyPages.contentEn: Krishnaraja Wodeyar IV was born in 1884. He inherited a beautiful kingdom and wanted to make it even more wonderful. He believed that a good ruler must provide schools, hospitals, and jobs for his people. His vision was to make Mysore shine like never before!
storyPages.contentKn: ಕೃಷ್ಣರಾಜ 1884 ರಲ್ಲಿ ಜನ್ಮೆ. ಸುಂದರ ರಾಜ್ಯ ಪಡೆದು ಆರೂ ಅಭಿವೃದ್ಧಿಯ ಸ್ವಪ್ನೆ! ಶಾಲೆ, ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆ, ಕೆಲಸ ನೀಡಬೇಕೆಂದು ನಿಶ್ಚಯ.

storyPages.contentEn: Krishnaraja Wodeyar built the magnificent Mysore Palace that still stands today! He opened hundreds of schools so children could learn. He built hospitals to help sick people. He started factories and industries. He loved art and music. Mysore became called the 'Switzerland of India'!
storyPages.contentKn: ಅರಮನೆ ನಿರ್ಮಾಣ! ಶಾಲೆ, ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆ, ಕಾರ್ಖಾನೆ ಸ್ಥಾಪಿಸಿ. ಕಲೆ ಮತ್ತು ಸಂಗೀತ ಪ್ರೋತ್ಸಾಹ! ಮೈಸೂರು 'ಭಾರತದ ಸ್ವಿಸ್ಸರ್ಲ್ಯಾಂಡ್' ಆದ!

storyPages.contentEn: Krishnaraja Wodeyar showed that a ruler can be both strong and kind. His people loved him because he cared for them. Even today, the Mysore Palace stands as a symbol of his vision. His name reminds us that true greatness comes from serving your people!
storyPages.contentKn: ಕೃಷ್ಣರಾಜ ಮಹಾರಾಜ ರುಷ್ಠ ಕರುಣೆಯ ಸಯೋಜಕ. ಜನ ಅವರನ್ನ ಪ್ರೀತಿ ಮಾಡುತ್ತಿದ್ದರು. ಅರಮನೆ ಅವರ ದೂರದೃಷ್ಟಿಯ ಚಿನ್ನ ಪ್ರಸೂತಿ! ಶಾಸಕ ಜನ ಸೇವಕ ಎಂದು ಉಣ್ಣಿಸಿ!

quizQuestions.questionEn: What did Krishnaraja Wodeyar IV build?
What was Mysore called under his rule?
When did Krishnaraja Wodeyar IV die?
